projects.title: AI Diabetes Detection System
projects.description: Deep learning CNN for diabetic retinopathy screening - production-style training pipeline and competition-grade accuracy.
projects.longDescription: A comprehensive deep learning solution for diabetes detection using Convolutional Neural Networks. The project involved data preprocessing, model architecture design, training, validation, and a portfolio-ready Kaggle notebook walkthrough.
projects.oneLinePitch: Computer vision workflow for diabetic retinopathy screening with transfer learning, augmentation, and explainable model evaluation.
projects.achievement: 2nd Place in Kufr El-Sheikh Olympics Competition
projects.challenge: Diabetic retinopathy is a leading cause of blindness, but early detection through manual examination is time-consuming and requires specialized expertise not always available.
projects.solution: Developed a robust CNN using Transfer Learning (ResNet50) with heavy data augmentation to address class imbalance. Achieved 94%+ accuracy on the test set, providing a quick, accessible screening workflow.
projects.impact: Demonstrated a deployable screening path for clinics with limited specialists - model performance and documentation suitable for stakeholder review and further clinical validation.

detailSections.title: Model workflow
items: Prepared retinal image data for supervised classification.
Used transfer learning to accelerate model quality with a compact training workflow.
Documented the notebook so the data preparation, training, and evaluation path can be reviewed end to end.

projects.title: BUDG - Business Data Governance Platform
projects.description: Enterprise data governance, bulk Excel ingestion, job tracking, migration APIs, and optional FastAPI pre-validation.
projects.longDescription: BUDG is a full-stack governance platform focused on bulk data and migration workflows. It combines a React/Vite bulk upload wizard, a jobs dashboard, entity-specific Jakarta servlets, WebSocket job progress, optional FastAPI Excel validation, MySQL persistence, Elasticsearch search, and export/migration APIs.
projects.oneLinePitch: Full-stack bulk data pipeline for a Java/Tomcat governance platform with React column mapping, live job progress, validation, and migration/export endpoints.
projects.challenge: Enterprise governance teams needed safe bulk create/update/delete flows across many governed object types while preserving permissions, segmentation rules, auditability, and downloadable job evidence.
projects.solution: Built a three-step React upload wizard, per-user bulk jobs dashboard, entity-specific backend upload/status/report servlets, WebSocket-first job tracking with polling fallback, optional Python pre-validation, and migration/export endpoints for BUDG-compatible packages.
projects.impact: Turned spreadsheet-driven governance changes into tracked, permission-aware jobs with validation feedback, downloadable reports, and repeatable migration paths for stewards and platform operators.
highlights: Three-step React wizard: choose context, map Excel columns, upload and monitor completion
Bulk jobs dashboard with status badges, history, report downloads, and original file downloads
Dozens of Jakarta servlet endpoints for object, relationship, and role bulk operations
WebSocket progress broadcasting with polling fallback and row-level job statistics
FastAPI validation service for Excel pre-checks before Java processing

detailSections.title: React SPA - bulk upload and jobs dashboard
items: Permission-aware upload type/entity/operation selection with segmentation support.
Browser-side .xlsx parsing with SheetJS and required-field validation before upload.
Multipart upload with cookie-based authentication, WebSocket-first progress, polling fallback, and downloadable reports.

detailSections.title: Java bulk and migration APIs
items: Entity-specific upload, status, report, template, and download endpoints for governed objects.
Relationship and role bulk endpoints with dynamic templates and delete safeguards.
Bulk migration and export flows for metadata, relationships, roles, and governance packages.

detailSections.title: Python validation service
items: FastAPI service that validates Excel files before insert/update/delete processing.
Per-entity processors for objects, relationships, and roles with reusable validators.
Shared checks for custom fields, parent hierarchy, segmentation, and database references.

projects.title: Smart Data Explorer - AI Data Analysis Tool
projects.description: AI-powered web app for CSV/Excel analysis, instant insights, interactive dashboards, natural-language queries, and forecasting.
projects.longDescription: Smart Data Explorer automatically analyzes uploaded CSV and Excel files, cleans data, detects column types, generates business insights, renders interactive dashboards, and lets users ask plain-English questions about their data.
projects.oneLinePitch: AI-assisted data analysis tool that turns spreadsheets into insights, charts, forecasts, and natural-language answers.
projects.challenge: Small teams often need quick spreadsheet analysis but do not have time to build dashboards, clean data manually, or write SQL/Python for every business question.
projects.solution: Built a FastAPI and React application with drag-and-drop upload, automatic cleaning, generated insights, dashboard tabs, basic forecasting, and natural-language AI queries over uploaded datasets.
projects.impact: Makes exploratory data analysis accessible to non-technical users while giving developers a clear full-stack example of file ingestion, analytics APIs, and AI-assisted querying.
highlights: CSV/Excel upload with file validation and data type detection
Automatic insights for products, revenue trends, customer segments, regions, and summary statistics
Interactive responsive dashboards with chart visualizations
Natural-language question answering over uploaded data
FastAPI backend with documented upload, insights, query, forecast, and data preview endpoints

detailSections.title: Analysis workflow
items: Upload structured CSV or Excel files through a responsive web interface.
Clean missing values, infer column types, and generate first-pass business insights.
Explore overview, products, customers, forecast, and region tabs from the dashboard.

detailSections.title: AI query experience
items: Ask questions such as best-selling product, monthly revenue, and top customers in natural language.
Route query requests through the backend so analysis logic stays centralized.
Keep OpenAI integration optional so the app can run with or without advanced AI features.

projects.title: ML Analytics Pipeline
projects.description: End-to-end ML analytics pipeline for validation, training hooks, and cloud-backed storage - built for repeatable deployments.
projects.longDescription: Analytics pipeline for large-scale processing and ML workflows with automated validation and deployment hooks across AWS and Azure.
projects.oneLinePitch: Repeatable ML pipeline pattern for dataset validation, cloud storage, model training hooks, and safer deployment handoffs.
projects.challenge: Teams lacked a repeatable path from validated datasets to deployed models, causing inconsistent metrics and slow releases.
projects.solution: Built Python ETL/orchestration with object storage on AWS S3 and Azure Blob, automated validation, and deployment scripts so models could be promoted with checks instead of manual handoffs.
projects.impact: Cut model promotion friction: deployment cycles shortened substantially and regressions were caught earlier via automated validation gates.
highlights: Python ETL with cloud object storage (S3 / Azure Blob)
Scikit-learn training with cross-validation and versioning
Deployment workflow tuned for faster iteration

detailSections.title: Pipeline strengths
items: Standardized data validation before model promotion.
Object-storage-friendly workflow for cloud deployments.
Deployment checks that reduce manual release mistakes.
